serverInfo.name: OneClick Virtualization Documentation

resources.name: virtualization-guides
resources.description: Guides for OneClickVirt, Proxmox VE, Incus, Docker, LXD, Containerd, Podman, QEMU, KubeVirt

resources.name: developer-documentation

resources.description: Agent Skills discovery index for documentation-oriented agent behavior

metadata.author: OneClick Virtualization Project
metadata.note: This static documentation site exposes public resources and discovery metadata, but no executable MCP tools.
